top_signals.title: Japan Officials Met Metals, LNG Firms in Unusual Moscow Talks
top_signals.summary: Japanese officials who visited Moscow last week met commodity exporters along with Russian government representatives in a rare high-level commercial contact between their countries since President Vladimir Putin ordered the 2022 full scale invasion of Ukraine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BofA Says Foreign Buyers Lured by UK Yields Despite Politics
top_signals.summary: Bank of America predicts a streak of gilt purchases by foreign buyers extended through May, as some of the highest government yields in major developed nations offset political turbulence and inflation fears.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: S4 Capital cuts jobs as Sorrell predicts ‘fewer people’ in advertising
top_signals.summary: S4 Capital has cut a further 150 jobs this year, amid warnings from Sir Martin Sorrell that AI will leave the advertising industry employing “fewer people” in the years ahead. The London-listed marketing group said its workforce has fallen to around 6,200, down from roughly 7,000 a year ago, as clients continue to rein in [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Disparities between ethnic groups are not always cause for alarm
top_signals.summary: Different outcomes merit investigation, but we should not assume reducing the gaps is desirable or necessary
